title: Apocalypse Night
description: Summon and defeat the demon's minions. A perilous journey awaits you.
body:
🩸 Perform the ritual. Summon the darkness. Conquer what answers.

🌑 Apocalypse Night

A Ritual-Driven Dark Fantasy Progression Mod for Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge)

Apocalypse Night introduces a structured progression system built around ritual summoning, biome-based escalation, and familiar management.

This is not a random mob expansion.
It is a designed gameplay loop that rewards preparation, exploration, and long-term world development.
This page is designed for you to explore and enjoy on your own, so we won't go into deep explanations here.

✨ Core Features
🔥 Ritual-Based Boss Encounters

Bosses do not spawn randomly

Construct altar structures to initiate summoning

Gather materials and intentionally trigger encounters

Designed as event-level battles with clear progression impact

📖 Contract Grimoire System (Familiar System)

Seal defeated Mato into magical contracts

Re-summon them as controllable familiars

Follow / Stay behavior support

Persistent strategic assets rather than temporary summons

Integrates into exploration and boss encounters

🌍 Biome-Driven Progression

Unique Mato variants tied to specific biomes:

Forest

Jungle

Desert

Snow

Encourages world expansion rather than base stagnation

Clear difficulty escalation across environments

🗿 Relic-Based Growth System

Powerful Mato drop progression relics

Relics act as advancement tools rather than cosmetic trophies

Reinforces the Hunt → Summon → Conquer → Grow loop

Designed to support long-term survival worlds

🔁 Structured Gameplay Loop

Hunt minor Mato
→ Craft ritual components
→ Perform summoning rituals
→ Defeat powerful Mato
→ Acquire relics
→ Strengthen your position
→ Explore new biomes

This cycle defines the core experience.

🧠 Development Philosophy

Apocalypse Night is an independent project developed by a Japanese beginner mod creator who embraced AI as a design and iteration partner.

AI tools were used extensively to:

Refine progression structures

Iterate system balance

Stress-test gameplay loops

Explore scalable content design

The result is a focused, system-driven experience built through experimentation and persistence.

This project aims to demonstrate how structured design and modern creative tools can be combined to build meaningful gameplay progression.

🎥 Developer Video Content (Japanese)

The developer plans to upload Japanese-language videos covering:

Development progress and behind-the-scenes workflow

Detailed explanations of gameplay systems

Design intentions and balancing philosophy

Future expansion plans for the mod

Visual demonstrations will help showcase mechanics and upcoming improvements.

🎯 Recommended For Players Who

Prefer structured progression over random encounters

Enjoy ritual mechanics and summoning systems

Like biome-based difficulty scaling

Want long-term survival depth

Appreciate system-focused indie development

🧩 Requirements

Minecraft 1.21.1

NeoForge 21.1.219+

GeckoLib 4.8.3+

🌒 Final Note

Apocalypse Night is designed around intentional escalation.

You decide when to summon the darkness.
You prepare for it.
You confront it.

And your world evolves because of it.
